installCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@9.15.9 --activate && pnpm config set registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ && pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile --network-concurrency=1 --fetch-retries=5
buildCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@9.15.9 --activate && pnpm run build
